title: Patch-Based Contrastive Learning and Memory Consolidation for Online Unsupervised Continual Learning

method.name: PCMC (Patch-based Contrastive learning and Memory Consolidation)

operation_cycle.wake_period: Model identifies and clusters incoming stream data
operation_cycle.sleep_period: Model retrains encoder and consolidates data representations

problem_domain.name: Online Unsupervised Continual Learning (O-UCL)
challenges: Non-stationary data streams (number of classes increases over time)
Unlabeled data (need to identify novel classes in real-time without supervision)
Cannot store data for future replay (online stream learning)

comparison_to_previous_work.relationship: PCMC utilizes some techniques from STAM but introduces several new ideas

applications: AI-powered drone exploring a new construction site
Face recognition system classifying people it has never seen before

evaluation.method: Performance evaluated frequently during the stream
evaluation.purpose: To monitor how the agent learns over time
